title: VanillaLemon
description: A compilation of QOL mods that enhance survival gameplay which I personally use.
body:
VanillaLemon compliments Minecraft like the flavors compliment themselves. With a few QOL mods, this pack seeks to make Minecraft just that much better for a survival experience.

The Pack includes a solution to pesky villagers, low framerates and the darkness of caves all in one place!

Play and enjoy Minecraft for longer with VanillaLemon!
(All credit for the Mods goes to the Mod authors w/ Love)
